_comment: Looth reaction palette, sourced from the BuddyBoss bb_reaction CPT (7 reactions, menu_order 0-6). 3 are custom community images (staged here, friendly-named); 4 are standard emoji/icon rendered from unicode. Hand to the comments+reactions lane (session 1c86c753) as the reaction set for the comment-reactions build. Source of custom pngs: /var/www/dev/wp-content/uploads/bb-reactions-media/.

reactions.label: Like
reactions.note: the existing like (discovery.likes) — not a new reaction; keep wired to the current like path
